rag_rules: Use assign only for implementation-level output bindings; avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope.
Ensure AGREE contracts are placed in valid component type or implementation scopes based on the scope of referenced features.
generic_rules: AGREE guarantees should reference only visible features or declared helpers within the same annex scope.
Avoid referencing implementation-only subcomponents or paths in component type annexes.
Generated AGREE code must not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Constants and equations in AGREE must use valid scalar types: int, real, bool.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use assign for implementation-level bindings.
Do not reference unresolved identifiers or invalid helpers in AGREE contracts.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Component type vs implementation scope distinctions in model fusion
